name: fulfillment_flow
description: Sub-workflow handling order fulfillment — reserves inventory, creates shipment, and updates order status.

tasks.name: reserve_inventory
tasks.description: Reserves warehouse inventory for the order items.

tasks.name: create_shipment
tasks.description: Creates a shipment record and generates a tracking number via the carrier API.

tasks.name: update_order_status
tasks.description: Updates the order record to 'shipped' with tracking details.
